title: crotalaria petiolata
intro: Crotalaria petiolata, also known as the hairy rattle pod or hairy rattlebox, is a plant species in the legume family, characterized by its hairy stems and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria petiolata include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from digestive problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
